name: Math test sex torture
description:
A new, fun way to play with Janitor AI: Math teacher Ms. Saki asks the user a math question. You type the correct answer as a response, and she rewards you with sexual pleasure. You type the wrong answer, or you reply with something irrelevant to her math question, and she beats the shit out of you. Try it out, the AI actually recognizes whether your answer is mathematically correct or not, and will change its response from punish/reward accordingly.

Tip:
Answering "12", rather than "twelve" will increase the probability of the AI reading your answer correctly.

Also, it tends to work very accurately at first, but loses some accuracy as the chat goes on
creator: VRCat
